atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right middle finger pain and tenderness.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain and tenderness in his right middle finger following a rear-end collision four to five days ago.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes the pain as sharp and constant, exacerbated by movement.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports experiencing some anger during the accident.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a hand injury.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a distal phalanx fracture of the middle finger.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports very much so pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Examination reveals tenderness to palpation over the distal phalanx of the right middle finger.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has a distal phalanx fracture of the middle finger.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has a hand injury.
